description: Let an AI agent read and trade a MetaTrader 5 account over MCP, behind a human-approval gate.
name: io.github.vincentwongso/mt5-trading-mcp

environmentVariables.description: MetaTrader 5 account number. Optional: overrides the config file and an already-logged-in terminal.
environmentVariables.name: MT5_LOGIN

environmentVariables.description: MetaTrader 5 account password. Env-only so it never lands in a config file. Optional when the terminal is already logged in.
environmentVariables.name: MT5_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: MetaTrader 5 broker/trade server name. Optional: overrides the config file and an already-logged-in terminal.
environmentVariables.name: MT5_SERVER

title: MetaTrader 5 MCP Bridge
